[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101110 5
1 0001010 2
2 1110111 6
3 0010000 1
4 0100001 2
5 1110111 6
6 0000101 2
7 1101110 5

12 21 1110111 6 match 2 5

34 43 1101111 6
45 54 1101110 5 match 0 7
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 0011100 3

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 0100101 3
24 42 1111111 a
35 53 0001111 4
46 64 1111111 a

60 06 1111111 a
71 17 0101101 4

03 30 0011101 4
14 41 1101111 6

47 74 1101110 5 match 0 7
50 05 0011110 4
61 16 1110111 6 match 2 5
72 27 1111111 a

26 62 1110111 6 match 2 5
37 73 0001101 3
